items.title: Sam Altman tells OpenAI staffers that military's 'operational decisions' are up to the government

items.title: Apple raises MacBook prices across the board as M5 chips, new displays signal AI-first strategy
items.summary: Apple’s Mac refresh moves the lineup further upmarket, pairing higher prices with faster performance in a push to give customers a reason to upgrade.

items.title: Nvidia to invest $4 billion into photonics companies Coherent and Lumentum
items.summary: Coherent and Lumentum will both receive $2 billion each from the chip giant as part of the strategic investment.

items.title: Private companies added 63,000 jobs in February, January revised to just 11,000 additions, ADP says
ADP says businesses add 63,000 jobs in February. Hiring picks up, but labor market is still sluggish.
items.summary: ADP said businesses created 63,000 new jobs in February — the biggest increase in seven months — in another sign that a sluggish U.S. labor market might be slightly perking up.

items.title: Adidas shares slump on weak profit guidance as tariffs and exchange rates bite

items.title: New York Fed's Williams says tariff burden falls 'overwhelmingly' on U.S. businesses and consumers
